name: Cyber Enviro-Tech, Inc.
summary: PART I OVERVIEW OF OUR COMPANY Our Company CYBER ENVIRO-TECH, INC. ("the Company", "CETI") was founded in the State of Wyoming as Electronic Biotek, Inc in April 1986 (Inception). Cyber Enviro-Tech, Inc is a water science technology company focusing on the remediation of contaminated industrial wastewater with an initial emphasis on the oil & gas industry. We are an emerging growth company with limited revenues and operating history. Our independent auditor has issued an audit opinion which incl...
